title: To Mr. Syme. With A Present Of A Dozen Of Porter.
content:
O, had the malt thy strength of mind,
            Or hops the flavour of thy wit,
        'Twere drink for first of human kind,
            A gift that e'en for Syme were fit.

    Jerusalem Tavern, Dumfries.
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Mr. Syme. With A Present Of A Dozen Of Porter."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
